title: R-0021: Surcharge at 10% — income ₹60L (bracket ₹50L–₹1Cr)
notes: Income ₹60L falls in 10% surcharge bracket (₹50L–₹1Cr). Surcharge = 10% × ₹11,92,500 = ₹1,19,250. New Regime cap is 25% — not triggered here (10% < 25%). Marginal relief not required (income is ₹10L above threshold, well within bracket).
